project.name: warioland4
project.title: Wario Land 4 Chaos Viewer
project.tagline: Interactive matching-decomp atlas for Wario Land 4.
project.cppNote: This is an agbcc/GBA C project. Keep functions in C; one-line register binding asm is okay when needed.
project.setup: git clone {github}; cd warioland4; git submodule update --init; make tools; place the clean ROM as baserom_us.gba; make extract; make
project.readFirst: README.md, Makefile, and the target module's existing C/ASM style.
project.rules: Do not use long inline asm blocks for decompiled functions. Preserve ROM checksum behavior.
